Plan A Better Detour

Start with a route, set how far you are willing to wander, and let the atlas surface stops with deep game lists, unusual cabinets, and dense local clusters.

Map pins and result cards stay linked so you can jump between the route and the arcade list while tuning the trip.

Hunt For Specific Games

Use search when you know the title. Use Browse when you want to wander the catalog by pinball, arcade, and manufacturer.

Rare-game markers highlight machines found in fewer than ten known U.S. locations.
